display.name: Woodsmoke Bunkhouse
display.short_description: A squat bunkhouse sags beside the road. The hearth is dead, but the lee bunk still holds a little warmth and a half-stuck pay locker waits by the wall.

choices.label: Rest in the lee bunk
choices.summary: Sit in the warm corner by the banked bricks and take one honest minute before the road drags you back outside.

choices.label: Pry open the pay locker
choices.summary: Work the swollen locker open and take the stamped road scrip before the roof decides to finish falling in.
